Title III of the Act is classified generally to subchapter II (§ 4531 et seq.) of chapter 55. a determination made under the plan pursuant to such title III that such technologies are essential to the national defense and that domestic industrial capabilities are insufficient to meet these needs.

children.heading: Coordination
children.label: b Coordination
children.text: The President shall develop the plan of action required by subsection (a) in consultation with any relevant head of a Federal agency, an advisory committee established under section 708(d) of the Defense Production Act of 1950 (), and appropriate stakeholders in the private sector.50 U.S.C. 4558(d)
